name: Tallahassee Chicken Salad (Florida Cooking)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Poached Chicken Thighs and Breasts
1/3 cup Mayonnaise, or as needed to moisten
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size mixing bowl, combine the poached chicken, celery, chow-chow, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Mix lightly.
3. Add mayonnaise and mix again.
4. Add more mayonnaise if needed to moisten well.
5. Chill 1 to 2 hours before serving.
6. Line a bowl or platter with greens and spoon the salad onto the greens.
